Off Calendar May-19-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:49:16 P.M and concluding at 1:55:36 P.M.

Plaintiff Shukry Azar appearing in pro per.
Defendant Pablo Rodriguez not appearing.

Shukry Azar examined by the Court.

The Court determins that it dose not have jurisdiction to award possession of the property to the plaintiff as this matter is not an unlawful detainer.

Matter is taken off calendar by the Court, Plaintiff to file an Unlawful Detainer action. (D505)
